command: echo '=== Strace MetaEditor to find .ex5 write failure ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all && rm -f '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>/dev/null && rm -f /tmp/me_trace.txt && timeout 90 strace -f -e trace=openat,rename,renameat2,unlink,write -o /tmp/me_trace.txt wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MetaEditor64.exe' /compile:'/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' /log 2>/dev/null; echo "Exit: $?" && echo '=== Lines mentioning ex5 ===' && grep -i 'ex5' /tmp/me_trace.txt 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== Lines with EACCES/EPERM/error ===' && grep -i 'EACCES\|EPERM\|ENOENT.*ex5\|PropFirmBot' /tmp/me_trace.txt 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== Check any new ex5 files ===' && find /root/.wine -name '*.ex5' -mmin -5 -ls 2>/dev/null && find /tmp -name '*.ex5' -mmin -5 -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Strace file size ===' && wc -l /tmp/me_trace.txt 2>/dev/null
